reason: A completed event bar is known only after its trigger print is received; filling at that already-observed close would be an impossible same-print execution under R14.

frozen_execution.event_entry: first print/open of the first event bar whose event timestamp is not earlier than signal availability
frozen_execution.event_holding: count the preregistered number of fully completed post-entry event bars
frozen_execution.event_exit: first print/open of the immediately following event bar after the holding count completes
frozen_execution.cash_open_entry: first 09:01 CT print not earlier than 09:00-bar availability
frozen_execution.cash_open_exit: first 10:01 CT print after the completed 10:00 CT minute
frozen_execution.latency_proxy: one subsequent observable print plus frozen slippage costs

effect_direction: The addendum can only add execution delay relative to the ambiguous close wording; it does not change signals, sides, thresholds, costs, nulls, DSR, BH or promotion gates.
CONTRE: The first subsequent print is still a bar-level executable proxy rather than a bid/ask quote; any survivor requires targeted TBBO evidence before a deployment ticket.
